title: Xtra Silky French Chicken Paella
description: A citrusy and silky French dish featuring chicken and lemon, perfect for a date night, cooked in a paella pan with agemono deep fry technique, onion and garlic free.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the paella pan over medium high heat.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
Add the Arborio rice to the pan and stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add the chicken broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the lemon juice, chopped parsley, and pitted dates.
Return the chicken to the pan and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Garnish with lemon zest and serve hot.
